ddls:
CREATE TABLE "launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the launch */,
  "launch_time_utc" TEXT /* Time of the launch in UTC */,
  "booster_version" TEXT /* Version of the booster used */,
  "launch_site" TEXT /* Site where the launch took place */,
  "payload" TEXT /* Description of the payload */,
  "payload_mass_kg" REAL /* Mass of the payload in kilograms */,
  "orbit" TEXT /* Orbit type for the mission */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer for the launch */,
  "mission_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the mission */,
  "landing_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the landing */,
  "launch_status" TEXT /* Current status of the launch */,
  "launch_window_start" TEXT /* Start of the launch window */,
  "launch_window_end" TEXT /* End of the launch window */,
  "launch_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch vehicle used */,
  "launch_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team responsible for the launch */,
  "launch_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the launch */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the launch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_landing_outcome FOREIGN KEY ("landing_outcome") REFERENCES landing_outcomes ("landing_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_booster_version FOREIGN KEY ("booster_version") REFERENCES booster_versions ("version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_mission_outcome FOREIGN KEY ("mission_outcome") REFERENCES mission_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_payload FOREIGN KEY ("payload") REFERENCES payloads ("payload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer (e.g., NASA, commercial entity) */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of the customer (e.g., government, commercial) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "customer_website" TEXT /* URL of the customer's website */,
  "customer_industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer operates in */,
  "customer_established_date" TEXT /* Date the customer was established */,
  "customer_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "customer_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "payload_name" TEXT /* Name of the payload */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of the payload (e.g., satellite, cargo) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the payload (e.g., ISS, Mars) */,
  "payload_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the payload */,
  "payload_length_m" REAL /* Length of the payload in meters */,
  "payload_diameter_m" REAL /* Diameter of the payload in meters */,
  "payload_power_w" REAL /* Power consumption of the payload in watts */,
  "payload_lifetime_years" INTEGER /* Expected lifetime of the payload in years */,
  "payload_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the payload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booster_versions" (
  "booster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booster version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version identifier of the booster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the booster characteristics */,
  "booster_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the booster */,
  "booster_length_m" REAL /* Length of the booster in meters */,
  "booster_diameter_m" REAL /* Diameter of the booster in meters */,
  "booster_thrust_kN" REAL /* Thrust of the booster in kilonewtons */,
  "booster_fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the booster */,
  "booster_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the booster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the launch site (e.g., pad, complex) */,
  "site_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the launch site */,
  "site_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the launch site */,
  "site_elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the launch site in meters */,
  "site_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of launches the site can handle per year */,
  "site_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbits" (
  "orbit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbit type */,
  "orbit_name" TEXT /* Name of the orbit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the orbit characteristics */,
  "orbit_altitude_km" REAL /* Altitude of the orbit in kilometers */,
  "orbit_inclination_deg" REAL /* Inclination of the orbit in degrees */,
  "orbit_period_min" INTEGER /* Period of the orbit in minutes */,
  "orbit_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the orbit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orbit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the outcome */,
  "outcome_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the outcome (e.g., Critical, Minor, None) */,
  "outcome_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landing_outcomes" (
  "landing_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landing outcome */,
  "landing_outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the landing outcome (e.g., Successful, Failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the landing outcome */,
  "landing_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the landing outcome */,
  "landing_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the landing outcome (e.g., Critical, Minor, None) */,
  "landing_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the landing outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landing_outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch associated with the analytics */,
  "mission_success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of missions over time */,
  "average_payload_mass" REAL /* Average payload mass for completed missions */,
  "average_landing_success_rate" REAL /* Average landing success rate for boosters */,
  "mission_completion_time_hours" REAL /* Time taken to complete the mission in hours */,
  "payload_performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the payload */,
  "booster_performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the booster */,
  "mission_cost_efficiency_score" REAL /* Cost efficiency score of the mission */,
  "mission_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the mission analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user in the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "user_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role responsibilities */,
  "role_department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  "role_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch associated with the log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., Information, Warning, Error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., System, User) */,
  "log_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launch_logs_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for compliance record */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Associated launch ID */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding compliance */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance */,
  "compliance_reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the compliance */,
  "compliance_additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the compliance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)
